zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Plessitis於1235年出生在英國時，他的父親Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham36歲，母親Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham35歲。他於1259年與Gladyna Le Romeyn在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1292年在英國英格蘭享年57歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Plessitis于1235年出生在英国时，他的父亲Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham36岁，母亲Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham35岁。他于1259年与Gladyna Le Romeyn在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1292年在英国英格兰享年57岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Plessitis was born in 1235, in United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham, was 36 and his mother, Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham, was 35. He married Gladyna Le Romeyn in 1259, in United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1292, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Chapel, County Wexford, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Plessitis est né en 1235, à Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Gladyna Le Romeyn en 1259, à Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1292, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Chapel, County Wexford, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Plessitis 1235 in United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham 36 und seine Mutter Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham 35. Er hat 1259 in United Kingdom Gladyna Le Romeyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1292 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chapel, County Wexford, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Plessitis è nato il nel 1235 nel Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Gladyna Le Romeyn nel 1259, nel Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1292, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Chapel, County Wexford, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Plessitisが1235年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Plessitis of Wrothamは36歳，母Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrothamは35歳であった。1259年にイギリスでGladyna Le Romeynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1292年にイギリスイギリスで57歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードチャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Plessitis(이)가 1235년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1259년 영국에서 Gladyna Le Romeyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1292년 영국 잉글랜드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 차플에 묻혔다.

mn.Enfield, Middlesex, England: Enfield, Middleseaxon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Plessitis nasceu em 1235, em United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Gladyna Le Romeyn em 1259, em United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1292, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Chapel, County Wexford, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Plessitis родился в 1235 г. в местности Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Gladyna Le Romeyn в 1259 г. в местности Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1292 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности чапел, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Plessitis nació en 1235, en Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Plessitis of Wrotham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Muriel de Wrotham - Heiress de Wrotham, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Gladyna Le Romeyn en 1259, en Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1292, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Chapel, County Wexford, Irlanda.
